title: Vintage Levi's 501 Jeans — Medium Wash
description: Classic 501s in a perfect medium wash. Some light fading at the knees which adds to the vintage look. No rips or stains.

title: Y2K Baby Tee — Butterfly Print
description: Super cute early 2000s baby tee with butterfly graphic. Fitted crop length. Tag says medium but fits like a small.

title: Oversized Flannel Shirt — Plaid Red/Black
description: Classic oversized flannel. Great layering piece. A few tiny pulls in the fabric but nothing visible when worn.

title: 90s Track Jacket — Navy/White Stripe
description: Authentic 90s track jacket with stripe detail down the sleeves. Full zip. Lightweight — great for layering.

title: Corduroy Wide-Leg Pants — Rust
description: Beautiful rust-colored cords in a wide-leg silhouette. High-waisted. Minor pilling on the seat but otherwise great condition.

title: Graphic Tee — 2003 Tour Bootleg Style
description: Vintage-style bootleg tee with faded graphic. Slightly boxy fit. 100% cotton, soft and worn-in.

title: Denim Jacket — Light Wash, Cropped
description: Cropped denim jacket in a light wash. Great structured shoulders. Blank canvas — no patches or pins but would be perfect to customize.

title: Knit Cardigan — Chunky Brown
description: Super cozy oversized cardigan. Earth-tone brown, chunky knit. Hits at the hip. Perfect for layering over anything.

title: Platform Mary Janes — Black Patent
description: Patent leather platform Mary Janes. 1.5 inch platform. Some light scuffing on the toe box but nothing major. UK size 5.

title: Vintage Windbreaker — Color Block Purple/Teal
description: Color block windbreaker from the early 90s. Packable, lightweight. The kind your dad definitely owned. Full zip with elastic cuffs.

title: Low-Rise Cargo Pants — Khaki
description: Y2K era low-rise cargo pants. Lots of pockets. Khaki color, slightly distressed at the hems. Great for layering with a long tee.

title: Oversized Crewneck Sweatshirt — Vintage Navy
description: Perfectly faded navy crewneck. Genuinely vintage — not manufactured distressed. Ribbed cuffs and hem. No graphics, clean.

title: 90s Silk Slip Dress — Floral, Midi Length
description: Delicate 90s slip dress in a muted floral print. Midi length, adjustable straps. Light snag on the side seam — not visible when worn.

title: Leather Belt — Brown, Braided
description: Genuine leather braided belt. Adjustable, multiple holes. Classic Western buckle. Can be dressed up or down.

title: Vintage Graphic Hoodie — Faded Black
description: Faded black pullover hoodie with barely-visible vintage graphic on the chest. Cozy interior. Some pilling but adds to the worn-in look.

title: High-Waisted Denim Shorts — Cutoff
description: DIY cutoff denim shorts from Levi's 501s. Raw hem, slightly frayed. High-waisted. Perfect summer length.

title: Mesh Long-Sleeve Top — Black

title: Vintage Linen Blazer — Cream
description: Lightweight linen blazer in cream. Relaxed fit, unstructured shoulders. Two front pockets. Could be dressed up or styled casually.

title: Platform Sneakers — White Chunky Sole

title: Henley Long Sleeve — Washed Burgundy

title: Straight Leg Khaki Trousers — Olive

title: Crochet Halter Top — Cream
description: Handmade-looking crochet halter. Ties at the neck and back. Perfect for layering over a tank in summer.

title: Vintage Polo Shirt — Forest Green

title: Wide-Leg Linen Trousers — Natural

title: Men's Poplin Short-Sleeve Shirt — White
description: Crisp white short-sleeve shirt in poplin cotton. Camp collar, relaxed fit. Very clean and minimal. Perfect summer smart-casual piece.

title: Men's Cargo Joggers — Olive
description: Slim cargo joggers in olive with side pockets. Elastic waist and cuffs. Comfortable but looks put-together. Great men's everyday pant.

title: Men's Vintage Sunglasses — Tortoiseshell Aviator
description: Tortoiseshell aviator-style sunglasses with brown gradient lenses. No scratches on the lenses. Very classic men's frame shape.

title: Men's Cropped Trench Coat — Beige
description: Cropped trench coat in beige. Double-breasted, belted. Hits at the hip rather than knee. Modern men's take on the classic trench.

title: Men's Graphic Skateboard Tee — White
description: White tee with faded skateboard brand graphic on the chest. Slightly cropped due to washing. Relaxed fit. 2000s skate culture vibes.

title: Men's Corduroy Cap — Olive
description: Unstructured corduroy baseball cap in olive. Adjustable strap back. Low profile. A subtle, stylish men's accessory.

title: Men's Heavyweight Zip Hoodie — Navy
description: Thick zip-up hoodie in navy. Split kangaroo pockets, metal YKK zip. Heavy cotton fleece. A solid men's layering essential for cold days.

title: Women's Satin Pajama-Style Pants — Navy
description: Wide-leg satin pants in navy that look like elevated pajamas. Elastic waist, piping detail. Dressy enough for going out. Very 90s minimal.

title: Women's Tie-Front Crop Top — Floral
description: Short-sleeve crop top with a front tie in a ditsy floral print. V-neckline. Very summer picnic. Pairs well with high-waisted denim.

title: Women's Leather Ankle Boots — Brown Chelsea
description: Women's Chelsea ankle boots in rich brown leather. Low stacked heel, elastic panels. Goes with jeans, skirts, dresses — everything.

title: Women's Oversized Blazer — Cream Linen
description: Relaxed oversized blazer in cream linen. Single button, patch pockets. The perfect throw-over-anything summer blazer for women.

title: Women's High-Waisted Leather Pants — Black
description: Genuine leather straight-leg pants in black. High-waisted, zip fly. Buttery soft. The ultimate cool-girl statement pant.

title: Women's Hair Claw Clips — Set of 3 Tortoiseshell
description: Set of 3 tortoiseshell claw clips in different sizes. Large, medium, and mini. Trendy hair accessory that's also practical.

title: Women's Knit Sweater Vest — Cream Cable
description: Cable-knit sweater vest in cream. V-neck, cropped length. Layer over a collared shirt or wear solo. Very preppy/dark academia.

title: Women's Strappy Heeled Sandals — Gold
description: Strappy heeled sandals in metallic gold. Thin straps, 3-inch stiletto heel. Very glam and perfect for special occasions or nights out.

title: Women's Paperbag Waist Shorts — Olive
description: High-waisted paperbag shorts in olive linen blend. Belted waist, relaxed leg. Elevated casual summer shorts for women.

title: Women's Embroidered Denim Jacket
description: Medium wash denim jacket with beautiful floral embroidery on the back panel. Women's cropped fit. A one-of-a-kind statement piece.

title: Men's Vintage Knit Polo — Brown Striped
description: Retro knit polo in brown with cream horizontal stripes. Short sleeve, ribbed collar. Very 70s menswear revival. Fits slim.

title: Men's Twill Shorts — Stone
description: Classic twill shorts in stone/light beige. 9-inch inseam, flat front. Clean and simple. A solid men's summer staple.

title: Men's Trail Running Shoes — Grey/Orange
description: Lightweight trail runners in grey with orange accents. Good grip, breathable mesh upper. Some trail wear but still fully functional.

title: Men's Corduroy Overshirt — Dusty Blue
description: Fine-wale corduroy overshirt in a muted dusty blue. Button front, two chest pockets. Heavier than a shirt, lighter than a jacket.

title: Men's Rain Jacket — Black Packable
description: Lightweight packable rain jacket in black. Hood with drawcord, zip front. Folds into its own pocket. Great for unpredictable weather.

title: Men's Vintage Tie — Silk Paisley
description: Vintage silk necktie in a rich paisley pattern. Deep red and gold tones. Classic width. Perfect for thrifted formal looks.

title: Men's Loose Fit Jeans — Stonewash
description: Loose-fit jeans in a classic stonewash. Relaxed through the hip and thigh. Very 90s skater vibes. Men's waist sizing.

title: Men's Merino Zip Mock Neck — Navy
description: Fine merino wool quarter-zip in navy. Mock neck, slim fit. Polished enough for work but comfortable enough for weekends. Men's fit.

title: Men's Slide Sandals — Black
description: Simple black slide sandals with contoured footbed. Lightweight EVA. Great for casual summer or post-gym. Men's sizing.

title: Men's Double-Breasted Blazer — Navy
description: Structured double-breasted blazer in navy. Gold-tone buttons, peak lapel. Fits slightly oversized. Very Italian menswear energy.

title: Women's Flowy Palazzo Pants — Black
description: Ultra-wide palazzo pants in black jersey. High-waisted, elastic waist. Incredibly comfortable and looks incredibly chic. Floor-length.

title: Women's Sequin Mini Dress — Silver
description: Allover silver sequin mini dress. Spaghetti straps, scoop neck. The party dress. Show-stopping for NYE or any celebration.

title: Women's Woven Leather Belt — Tan
description: Wide woven leather belt in tan. Brass buckle. 2-inch width, looks stunning over dresses or defining the waist on blazers.

title: Women's Cropped Puffer Jacket — Black
description: Cropped puffer jacket in black. Stands collar, zip front. Hits at the waist — great proportions with high-waisted pants. Warm and stylish.

title: Women's Button-Front Midi Dress — Rust Linen
description: Beautiful rust linen midi dress with tortoiseshell buttons down the front. Short sleeve, cinched waist. Very cottagecore summer goddess.

title: Women's Platform Sneakers — White Leather
description: Clean white leather platform sneakers. 1.5-inch sole. Lace-up. Adds height while still being comfortable. Minimal and goes with everything.

title: Women's Satin Scrunchie Set — 5 Pack Neutrals
description: Set of 5 satin scrunchies in neutral tones — black, cream, sage, blush, and brown. Gentle on hair. Mix of muted colors.

title: Women's Off-the-Shoulder Sweater — Grey
description: Slouchy off-the-shoulder sweater in heather grey. Soft brushed knit. Hits at the hip. Cozy and feminine for fall/winter.

title: Women's Vintage Leather Crossbody — Saddle Brown
description: Small structured crossbody bag in saddle brown leather. Flap closure, brass buckle. Adjustable strap. Has gorgeous aged patina.

title: Women's Printed Wrap Top — Abstract Black/White
description: Wrap-style top in a bold black and white abstract print. Ties at the side, fluttery short sleeves. Flattering and eye-catching.
